name: industrial_policy_staffing_model_assigns_oakline_ind_col
premise: A Industrial Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving industrial policy staffing model assigns oakline ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Luc Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Luc Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Industrial Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Mei Kaur
agents.identity: I am Mei Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Industrial Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Luc Ibrahim must decide under individual vs collective. What does Luc Ibrahim do?
